socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.

While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 11% less Damage from Enemies in Aura

name: Queen of the Forest
explicitMods: 1% increased Movement Speed per 600 Evasion Rating, up to 75%

she forged a new destiny.
Sacrificing the ephemeral joys of man,
she embraced the eternal grasp of nature.
Seizing her one true wish,
she found peace at last.
